title: [MTR3/4]Innovia_metro_mark2
description: This resource pack adds INNOVIA Metro Mark II train for Minecraft Transit Railway Mod.
body:
![innovia metro](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bf55b0aeb996bb1653a22267b3bc8f4ed2df402.png)

## Introduction

This resource pack adds INNOVIA Metro Mark II trains. (Airtrain JFK & Yongin Everline)

This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway** Mod (MTR3 or MTR4)

and Nemo's Transit Expansion (NTE) when you're using MTR3

## Contents

* INNOVIA Metro Mark II Train Yongin Everline livery
* INNOVIA Metro Mark II Train Airtrain JFK livery
